calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On May 19, 2003
Off Calendar May-21-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Lois Jones.
Regina Brown the Deputy Attorney General, for Plaintiff Dept. of Fair Employment and Housing.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Richard Petrakovsky a.k.a. Richard Fairchild as follows:
1-Defendant shall pay to Lena Lazareva this sum of $46,880.00, plus interest in the amount of $6,103.98.
2-Defendant shall pay to the State of California's General Fund the principal amount of $5,000.00, plus interest in the amount of $604.18.
3-Defendant shall comply with Commission's ordered as follows:
A-Immediately cease from unlawful employment practices.
B-Within 60 days of this judgment attend a training program on sexual harassment.
C-Within 100 days of this judgment provide written notification to the Department and the Commission of the compliance.
D-Notify the Department and the Commission of any change of address and phone
4-Costs in the amount of $196.00
Does 1-10 are dismissed with prejudice.
Judgment signed in open court.
